stemHtml: Which of these statements about oxygen in transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: If the automatic passenger oxygen mask presentation fails, there is no manual backup.
options.b: It is not possible to visually verify when the oxygen flows to a passenger mask.
options.c: Chemical oxygen generators are used in the cockpit to supply the flight crew because of the low weight of this system.
options.d: A chemical oxygen generator cannot be switched off.
